raw_text: Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

actions.detail: Confirmation message drafted for the requester.
actions.artifact: Your service request for the reported location has been logged and routed to our Facilities & Environmental Services team, who will attend within the standard service window. Reference details are in your case log entry. [mock draft]
